title: Inventory Randomizer
description: Randomizes and multiplies your inventory when you take damage.
body:
Randomizes and multiplies your inventory when you take damage. (blaze rods, ender pearls etc. aren't randomized)
This mod also allows massive item stacks (more than 64)


[![Video](https://i.imgur.com/4ywKGW6.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DYGqVSwvtUc)
